title: Login Page Alert Bar and Uninstalled App Error Guidance
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want helpful guidance on the login page when authentication errors occur, so that I can resolve common issues like completing the install process or authorizing an uninstalled app.
description:
Add an alert bar to the login page and contextual error handling for Salesforce authentication failures.

### Login Page Alert Bar
Link to the install process tutorial: `/tutorials/completing-datatools-pro-install-process/`

### Uninstalled App Error
When a non-admin user tries to authenticate against Salesforce and gets an error related to an uninstalled app, display a notification with a link to: `/tutorials/authorizing-an-salesforce-uninstalled-app/`
acceptance_criteria: Login page displays an alert bar linking to the install process tutorial
Uninstalled app authentication errors show a notification with a link to the authorization tutorial
Error handling distinguishes between uninstalled app errors and other authentication failures
ux_changes: Alert bar on login page with tutorial link. Contextual error message for uninstalled app authentication failures with link to authorization tutorial.
middleware_changes: Error detection for Salesforce uninstalled app authentication failures to trigger appropriate notification.
